news.headline: Accused shooter was targeting Trump and US officials, authorities say
news.summary: President Donald Trump says suspect wrote an anti-Christian declaration and is 'sick guy'.

news.headline: Chernobyl: Two Takes, Then & Now. On the Ground 40 years on
news.summary: Forty years ago, one reactor in the Chernobyl power plant, in Ukraine, exploded, leading to the worst-ever nuclear catastrophe.

news.headline: Israel’s President, Putting Off Decision on Pardon for Netanyahu, Will Push for Plea Deal
news.summary: President Isaac Herzog of Israel has decided not to issue a pardon to Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu in his corruption case at this time, and instead will seek mediation, officials say.

news.headline: Strikes in Ukraine and Russia kill at least 16 on Chernobyl disaster anniversary

news.headline: First trial of Assad-era Syrian official starts in Damascus
